tiktok.caption: You spend 30% more money on weekends and your budget has no idea — $4,300/year gone without noticing

youtube_short.title: The Weekend Spending Trap Stealing $4,300/Year
title_alternatives: Why You're Always Broke After Weekends (The Real Math)
Your Weekends Are Stealing $425,000 From Your Retirement
youtube_short.description: Did you know you spend 30% more money on weekends than weekdays? Most budgets track Monday through Friday and completely miss the two biggest spending days of the week. The average American overspends $83 per weekend — that's $4,316 a year quietly draining your finances. Invested instead over 30 years at 7%, that becomes $425,000. Here's how the weekend trap works and the one simple fix that stops it cold. #personalfinance #budgeting #moneytips #savemoney #financialfreedom

hook_line: You spend 30% more on weekends — here's the $425K cost
